entries.title: Crane Game Research: Genealogy, Archeology, and Media Theory" (Book Guide for Gamers: No. 58)

entries.description: The crane game, with its simple mechanism of manipulating an arm inside a box to drop a prize, has an indescribable appeal. Where did these machines, which are now the flower of arcade games, come from? This book, "Crane Game Research: Genealogy, Kogaku, and Media Theory," is a book that answers such questions.
